rule: Statuses are profile-relative. They are not global theological judgments.

canonical_statuses.protocanonical: Central ordinary canon in the selected canon profile.
canonical_statuses.deuterocanonical: Catholic deuterocanonical status in a Catholic or Catholic-aware profile.
canonical_statuses.anagignoskomena: Orthodox readable/read-in-church status in an Orthodox profile.
canonical_statuses.antilegomena: Disputed, later-received, or historically contested status.
canonical_statuses.broader_canon: Broader-canon status, especially for Ethiopian or other expansive profiles.
canonical_statuses.appendix: Included as an appendix or secondary section in the selected profile.
canonical_statuses.liturgical_reading: Carried because it is read liturgically.
canonical_statuses.witness_only: Present for study/source comparison but not included in the selected canon profile.
canonical_statuses.excluded: Deliberately not included in the selected profile.

use_classes.read_in_church: Read liturgically in the selected tradition/profile.
use_classes.read_devotionally: Appropriate for devotional or home reading in the selected tradition/profile.
use_classes.study_only: Available for study or source comparison, not presented as read in church.
use_classes.not_in_profile: Not included in the selected profile.
